title: Erewhon Review | #shorts
full_text: hello Namaste I'm in Los Angeles checking out the very overhyped air wand and I got myself a h Beaver smoothie first of all we ordered it at 5:16 and received it at 540 so that's the kind of wait time but is good feels like a lot of sugar it tastes like a strawberry banana smoothie it's got these White Stripes which are mysterious they say it's coconut cream it could just be the cup I have no idea don't even care but it's a Vibe you don't drink this smoothie for the Smoothie you drink this smoothie because it reminds you how rich you are hang out at air Bor why because the air is where you are one with the people the LA people need to do drama with everything so here we are airborne smoothie H people amazing smoothie I mean listen to you you have a stick you pulled it off and like there are 100 people waiting to get it so like
